parameters.subject: =New SubTask Assigned: {{$json.subtask_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.responsible_person_first_name}} {{$json.responsible_person_last_name}},

You have been assigned a new subtask requiring your attention.

Subtask Details

Subtask Title {{$json.subtask_title}}
Description {{$json.description}}
Status {{$json.status}}
Priority {{$json.priority}}
Assigned To {{$json.responsible_person_first_name}} {{$json.responsible_person_last_name}}
Start Date {{$json.subtask_start_date}}
End Date {{$json.subtask_end_date}}
Estimated Time (hrs) {{$json.subtask_estimated_time}}
Parent Task {{$json.parent_task_title}}
Project Name {{$json.project_title}}
Milestone Name {{$json.milestone_title}}
Subtask Link View Subtask Details

Please begin execution and keep the subtask status updated.

Regards,
Task Management System

parameters.query:
SELECT
  st.id AS subtask_id,
  st.title AS subtask_title,
  st.description,
  st.status,
  st.priority,
  st.target_date AS subtask_target_date,
  st.created_at AS subtask_created_at,
  st.parent_id,
  st.estimated_hour AS subtask_estimated_time,

  CONVERT_TZ(st.expected_start_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS subtask_start_date,
  CONVERT_TZ(st.target_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS subtask_end_date,

  u.id AS responsible_person_id,
  u.firstname AS responsible_person_first_name,
  u.lastname AS responsible_person_last_name,
  u.email AS responsible_person_email,

  pt.id AS parent_task_id,
  pt.title AS parent_task_title,

  m.id AS milestone_id,
  m.title AS milestone_title,

  pm.id AS project_id,
  pm.title AS project_title,

  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.id ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.firstname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.lastname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.email ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_emails

FROM task_managements st

JOIN spree_users u
  ON u.id = st.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN task_managements pt
  ON pt.id = st.parent_id

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = pt.milestone_id

LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = pt.project_management_id

LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = st.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  st.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
  AND st.parent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND u.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84)

GROUP BY st.id;

nodes.name: Fetch the created annd assigned tasks in pas 1 hr

parameters.query:
SELECT
  st.id AS subtask_id,
  st.title AS subtask_title,
  st.description,
  st.status,
  st.priority,
  st.target_date AS subtask_target_date,
  st.created_at AS subtask_created_at,
  st.parent_id,
  st.estimated_hour AS subtask_estimated_time,

  CONVERT_TZ(st.expected_start_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS subtask_start_date,
  CONVERT_TZ(st.target_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS subtask_end_date,

  u.id AS responsible_person_id,
  u.firstname AS responsible_person_first_name,
  u.lastname AS responsible_person_last_name,
  u.email AS responsible_person_email,

  pt.id AS parent_task_id,
  pt.title AS parent_task_title,

  m.id AS milestone_id,
  m.title AS milestone_title,

  pm.id AS project_id,
  pm.title AS project_title

FROM task_managements st

JOIN spree_users u
  ON u.id = st.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN task_managements pt
  ON pt.id = st.parent_id

-- milestone (can be NULL safely)
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = pt.milestone_id

-- ✅ FIX: project directly from parent task
LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = pt.project_management_id

WHERE
  st.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 60 MINUTE
  AND st.parent_id IS NOT NULL;

parameters.query:
SELECT
  st.id AS subtask_id,
  st.title AS subtask_title,
  st.description,
  st.status,
  st.priority,
  st.target_date AS subtask_target_date,
  st.created_at AS subtask_created_at,
  st.parent_id,
  st.estimated_hour AS subtask_estimated_time,

  CONVERT_TZ(st.expected_start_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS subtask_start_date,
  CONVERT_TZ(st.target_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS subtask_end_date,

  -- Responsible person
  u.id AS responsible_person_id,
  u.firstname AS responsible_person_first_name,
  u.lastname AS responsible_person_last_name,
  u.email AS responsible_person_email,

  -- Parent task info
  pt.id AS parent_task_id,
  pt.title AS parent_task_title,

  -- Milestone
  m.id AS milestone_id,
  m.title AS milestone_title,

  -- Project (from parent task)
  pm.id AS project_id,
  pm.title AS project_title,

  -- Observers
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.id ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.firstname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.lastname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.email ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_emails

FROM task_managements st

JOIN spree_users u
  ON u.id = st.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN task_managements pt
  ON pt.id = st.parent_id

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = pt.milestone_id

LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = pt.project_management_id

-- Observers from task_users (only active observers)
LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = st.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  st.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
  AND st.parent_id IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY st.id;
